Package com.rays.ctl

Class UserCtl

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.rays.common.BaseCtl<UserDTO,​UserServiceInt,​UserForm>
      • com.rays.ctl.UserCtl
  • @RestController
@RequestMapping("User")
public class UserCtl
extends BaseCtl<UserDTO,​UserServiceInt,​UserForm>
    REST controller for managing User-related operations in the ORS application.

    Extends BaseCtl to inherit common CRUD and search endpoints, parameterized with UserDTO, UserServiceInt, and UserForm. All endpoints are accessible under the /User base URL mapping.

    Provides additional endpoints for preloading role dropdown data, updating user profiles, changing passwords, and uploading or downloading profile pictures.

    Author:
    Krati Trivedi

    • Field Summary

      Fields 
      Modifier and Type Field Description
      (package private) AttachmentServiceInt attachmentService
      Service for handling file attachment operations such as profile picture upload and download.
      (package private) RoleServiceInt roleService
      Service for retrieving Role data used to populate the role dropdown.

    • Field Detail

      • roleService

        @Autowired
RoleServiceInt roleService
        Service for retrieving Role data used to populate the role dropdown.

      • attachmentService

        @Autowired
AttachmentServiceInt attachmentService
        Service for handling file attachment operations such as profile picture upload and download.

    • Constructor Detail

      • UserCtl

        public UserCtl()

    • Method Detail

      • preload

        @GetMapping("preload")
public ORSResponse preload()
        Preloads dropdown data required for the User form.

        Retrieves and returns a list of all available roles to be used as dropdown options on the client side.

        Returns:
        an ORSResponse containing the role dropdown list under the key roleList

      • myProfile

        @PostMapping("myProfile")
public ORSResponse myProfile​(@RequestBody @Valid
                             @Valid MyProfileForm form,
                             org.springframework.validation.BindingResult bindingResult)
        Updates the profile information of the currently authenticated user.

        Validates the form first, then retrieves the existing user record and updates personal details such as first name, last name, date of birth, phone number, and gender.

        Parameters:
        form - the MyProfileForm containing updated profile details, validated via @Valid
        bindingResult - the result of form validation
        Returns:
        an ORSResponse indicating success or failure of the profile update operation

      • changePassword

        @PostMapping("changePassword")
public ORSResponse changePassword​(@RequestBody @Valid
                                  @Valid ChangePasswordForm form,
                                  org.springframework.validation.BindingResult bindingResult)
        Changes the password of the currently authenticated user.

        Validates the form first, then delegates to the service to verify the old password and apply the new password. On success, a confirmation email is sent to the user's registered email address. If the old password is incorrect, an appropriate error message is returned.

        Parameters:
        form - the ChangePasswordForm containing the login, old password, and new password, validated via @Valid
        bindingResult - the result of form validation
        Returns:
        an ORSResponse indicating whether the password was changed successfully or if the old password was invalid

      • uploadPic

        @PostMapping("/profilePic/{userId}")
public ORSResponse uploadPic​(@PathVariable
                             java.lang.Long userId,
                             @RequestParam("file")
                             org.springframework.web.multipart.MultipartFile file,
                             javax.servlet.http.HttpServletRequest req)
        Uploads a profile picture for the specified user.

        Accepts a multipart file and saves it as an AttachmentDTO. If the user already has a profile picture, the existing attachment is updated; otherwise a new one is created and the user's image ID is set.

        Parameters:
        userId - the ID of the user whose profile picture is being uploaded
        file - the MultipartFile containing the image to upload
        req - the HttpServletRequest for the current request
        Returns:
        an ORSResponse containing the saved image ID under the key imageId

      • downloadPic

        @GetMapping("/profilePic/{userId}")
public void downloadPic​(@PathVariable
                        java.lang.Long userId,
                        javax.servlet.http.HttpServletResponse response)
        Downloads and streams the profile picture of the specified user.

        Retrieves the user's associated attachment and writes the image bytes directly to the HTTP response output stream with the appropriate content type. If no profile picture is found, an error message is written to the response.

        Parameters:
        userId - the ID of the user whose profile picture is to be downloaded
        response - the HttpServletResponse used to stream the image data
